debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
ω : WignerSpace n
i j : Fin n
⊢ (if h_eq : i = j then @ω ⟨(i, i), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_2 n i⟩
    else
      if h_lt : i < j then @ω ⟨(i, j), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_3 n i j h_lt⟩
      else
        have h_gt := wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_4 n i j h_eq h_lt;
        @ω ⟨(j, i), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_5 n i j h_gt⟩) =
    if h_eq : j = i then @ω ⟨(j, j), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_2 n j⟩
    else
      if h_lt : j < i then @ω ⟨(j, i), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_3 n j i h_lt⟩
      else
        have h_gt := wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_4 n j i h_eq h_lt;
        @ω ⟨(i, j), wignerMatrixEntryFunction._proof_5 n j i h_gt⟩

failed_attempts:
· rfl
  · subst h₁; contradiction
  · subst h₃; contradiction
  · exact (lt_asymm h₂ h₄).elim
  · rfl
  · subst h₃; contradiction
  · rfl
  · have := lt_of_le_of_ne (le_of_not_lt h₂) (Ne.symm h₁)
    contradiction

· simp [h]
  · simp [h, h.symm]
    rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h_lt | rfl | h_gt
    · simp [h_lt, lt_asymm h_lt]
    · contradiction
    · simp [h_gt, lt_asymm h_gt]
split_ifs <;> aesop
split_ifs <;> simp_all

by_cases h : i < j
  · rw [dif_neg (ne_of_lt h), dif_pos h, dif_neg (ne_of_gt h), dif_neg (not_lt_of_gt h)]
    congr
  · by_cases h' : j < i
    · rw [dif_neg (ne_of_gt h'), dif_neg (not_lt_of_gt h'), dif_neg (ne_of_lt h'), dif_pos h']
      congr
    · have h_eq : i = j := le_antisymm (le_of_not_lt h') (le_of_not_lt h)
      subst h_eq
      rw [dif_pos rfl, dif_pos rfl]
split_ifs <;> simp_all
try exact (‹i ≠ j› (le_antisymm (le_of_not_lt ‹¬j < i›) (le_of_not_lt ‹¬i < j›))).elim
rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h | rfl | h <;> aesop
split_ifs <;> simp_all
split_ifs <;> simp_all

· rfl
  · subst h₁; cases lt_irrefl _ h₂
  · subst h₁; contradiction
  · subst h₃; cases lt_irrefl _ h₂
  · cases lt_asymm h₂ h₄
  · rfl
  · subst h₃; contradiction
  · rfl
  · cases h₁ (le_antisymm (le_of_not_lt h₄) (le_of_not_lt h₂))

· simp [h, ne_of_lt h, lt_asymm h]
  · simp [h]
  · simp [h, ne_of_gt h, lt_asymm h]

· simp [h, lt_asymm h, ne_of_lt h]
  · rfl
  · simp [h, lt_asymm h, ne_of_gt h]

· simp [h, ne_of_lt h, not_lt_of_gt h]
  · simp
  · simp [h, ne_of_gt h, not_lt_of_gt h]

· simp
  · simp [h, not_lt_of_lt h, ne_of_lt h, ne_of_gt h]
  · simp [h, not_lt_of_lt h, ne_of_lt h, ne_of_gt h]
all_goals cases lt_trichotomy i j <;> simp_all
split_ifs <;> aesop

· simp [h, not_lt_of_gt h, ne_of_lt h]
  · rfl
  · simp [h, not_lt_of_gt h, ne_of_gt h]
split_ifs <;> simp_all

· simp [h, not_lt_of_lt h, ne_of_lt h, ne_of_gt h]
  · rfl
  · simp [h, not_lt_of_lt h, ne_of_lt h, ne_of_gt h]
split_ifs <;> aesop

· simp [h, ne_of_lt h, ne_of_gt h, not_lt_of_gt h]
  · simp [h]
  · simp [h, ne_of_gt h, ne_of_lt h, not_lt_of_gt h]

| rfl
    | contradiction
    | exact False.elim (lt_asymm ‹i < j› ‹j < i›)
    | cases lt_trichotomy i j <;> contradiction

· simp [h, ne_of_lt h, lt_asymm h]
  · simp [h]
  · simp [h, ne_of_lt h, lt_asymm h]
split_ifs <;> simp_all
split_ifs <;> aesop

· simp [h, ne_of_lt h, ne_of_gt h, not_lt_of_gt h]
  · simp [h]
  · simp [h, ne_of_gt h, ne_of_lt h, not_lt_of_gt h]
rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h | rfl | h <;> simp_all
split_ifs <;> aesop

· simp [h, ne_of_lt h, ne_of_gt h, lt_asymm h]
  · simp
  · simp [h, ne_of_lt h, ne_of_gt h, lt_asymm h]
rcases lt_trichotomy i j with h | rfl | h <;> simp_all
